title: kryptostoma excelsum
side_effects: Kryptostoma excelsum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and gastrointestinal issues. In rare cases, improper use of Kryptostoma excelsum may cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory problems. Furthermore, combining the plant with other medications or substances can exacerbate side effects and increase the risk of adverse reactions.
